_meta.notes: 113-seat Legislature. DPP historic majority. 73 district seats + 34 party-list + 6 indigenous. Pre-2019 redistricting — boundaries from g0v/twgeojson. Source: CEC db.cec.gov.tw. District-level results pending — feature IDs must be verified against g0v twVote2010.geo.json.

seat_breakdown.notes: DPP: 46 district + 18 party-list + 4 indigenous. KMT: 20 district + 11 party-list + 4 indigenous. NPP: 4 district + 1 party-list. PFP: 3 party-list. MKT (Minkuotang): 1 district. IND: 1.
